atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constipation

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports explosive diarrhea

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a sensitive stomach to pasta with creamy sauces

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a bowel movement frequency of approximately three to four times per week

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain improves when he massages his abdomen

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies nausea

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies vomiting

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports bowel sounds in all four quadrants of the abdomen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes stool in the patient's lower colon.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes a slight enlargement of the liver.

atomic_propositions.speaker: physician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's primary care physician reported slightly elevated liver enzymes (ALT, AST, ALP) four months prior.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes no jaundice in the patient's eyes and skin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes normal lung sounds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes normal heart sounds with no murmurs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with symptoms suggestive of a gastrointestinal disorder, potentially including irritable bowel syndrome or other functional bowel issues.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a cervical MRI to evaluate for cervical radiculopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Counsel the patient on dietary modifications to manage his symptoms, including avoiding trigger foods and increasing fiber intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Continue the patient on Crestor and olmesartan.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise him to continue Tylenol as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess response to treatment and further investigate findings.
